revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-8-075

The sum of the rated power outputs that are available from a set of sources of the same kind.


Note:  In French the term puissance installee refers also to the total load that can be connected to a source.

{{IALAFooter}}
